commands.review_summary:
The PR marks context-engine spend-backoff compaction failures as transient in CLI turn compaction and adds regression tests for returned and thrown backoff paths.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +135. Total +148 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible only: current main clearly throws when context-engine compaction returns a failure reason, and the PR tests model the two spend-backoff shapes. There is still no live current-main spend-backoff CLI/log reproduction posted.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair lane: the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real CLI/log proof and maintainer confidence in the transient classifier, not a narrow code defect.
